about.tagline: Boutique wedding and event planning in Philadelphia since 2012.

package.name: Day of Coordination
package.bestFor: Couples who have planned the day and want it run cleanly.

includes.item: Two planning meetings in the final six weeks
Master day of timeline shared with every vendor
On site from setup through the end of the reception
One coordination assistant on the day

package.name: Signature Planning
package.bestFor: Couples who want a guide from booking to the last dance.

includes.item: Vendor sourcing with at least two options per category
Design direction for florals, lighting, and seating
Monthly check in calls through the planning year

package.name: Full Service
package.bestFor: Large or multi space weddings that need full production.

includes.item: Full floor plan and seating chart drafted and revised
Weather contingency planning for outdoor venues
Guest accommodation blocks and transport coordination
Rehearsal direction and a second assistant on the day

terms.deposit: Half of the package fee holds the date. The balance is due thirty days before the wedding.
terms.consultation: The first consultation is complimentary and runs about an hour.
